• A web-based mining game with multiplayer functionality
  • Features procedurally generated 2D maps with various ores and materials
  • Includes vehicle controls, inventory management, and a shop system
  • Supports mobile and desktop controls with customizable key bindings
  • Implements cloud save system with conflict resolution
  • Features admin controls for multiplayer servers
    class GameEngine { constructor() { this.canvas = $('gameCanvas'); this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d'); } }
    class NetworkManager { constructor() { this.client = null; this.baseTopic = 'mm_online/'; } }

This is a sophisticated web-based mining game featuring a 2D procedurally generated world where players can dig for resources, upgrade their equipment, and interact with other players through a real-time multiplayer system. The game includes a comprehensive shop system, inventory management, and cloud save functionality with conflict resolution. It supports both desktop and mobile controls, offers customizable key bindings, and includes admin controls for managing multiplayer servers. The game uses advanced rendering techniques including dynamic lighting, particle effects, and a minimap system to create an immersive mining experience.
